emails.subject: Allegheny Energy deals
emails.body: Allegheny Energy deals We got a call from Allegheny Energy Electric Cooperative complaining that we have sent confirmations for deals that they do not have. Could you check on these two deals. The broker paper has these deals with Allegheny Energy Supply Company. 577363 577360 Thanks
